summary: All four requirements are implemented in the diff. EventsPage.tsx imports useEffect and useState from React, imports useSport from SportContext, destructures sportStatus and currentSport, adds a useEffect with the correct dependency array [sportStatus, currentSport], derives filteredEvents, and renders filteredEvents with the manual chip UI preserved. REQ-4 is a behavioral/e2e verification requirement and the code structure correctly supports all four described behaviors.
